case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. SANDRA MAY PRICE et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)
